description: Card built over an arrest photograph. The base photo shows a handcuffed Hispanic man in a white t-shirt and purple shorts (hands behind back) standing between two armed police officers in gray digital-camo uniforms, body armor, and patrol caps; the officer at right holds a rifle. Behind them is a wall bearing a blue-and-white 'POLICIA' shield. Across the image in large distressed cream and tan brush lettering are the words 'GANG' (top left, diagonal) and 'ARREST' (bottom right, diagonal). The top-right corner has a black banner reading 'MS-13 / La Mara Salvatrucha' in white serif type. A semi-transparent dark-red panel at lower left reads in white sans-serif: 'Wilmer Alexy Garcia-Manzanarez' followed by bulleted charges: 'Wanted for Murder in El Salvador, Burglary, Menacing/intimidation with a weapon, DUI, Driving without a license.' The white DHS seal and 'ICE' wordmark sit at the bottom right.
notable_text: MS-13 La Mara Salvatrucha; GANG ARREST; Wilmer Alexy Garcia-Manzanarez; Wanted for Murder in El Salvador; Burglary; Menacing/intimidation with a weapon; DUI; Driving without a license; ICE
